/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libcustom_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so -o libcustom_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so CMakeFiles/custom_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/custom_interfaces/msg/coord__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/yura/firstprogram/build/custom_interfaces:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: libcustom_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib
